income_thresholds.description: No income ceiling; targets families NOT covered under PM-JAY SECC list, specifically ASHA workers, Anganwadi workers, and other non-SECC families identified by the state
income_thresholds.source: UP State Government GO 2019 / NHA-UP SHA Guidelines

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Uttar Pradesh are eligible
Families already covered under PM-JAY through SECC 2011 are NOT eligible for MJAY; MJAY supplements PM-JAY for non-SECC families
Families covered under CGHS or ESIC are excluded
Class A and Class B government employees and their families are excluded

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as per the Ayushman card. All members listed on the family card are covered. Coverage is floater across all family members. No cap on family size.

covered_procedures: Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for e-KYC verification at empanelled hospital or CSC

required_documents.name: Ration Card (NFSA)
required_documents.notes: Helps verify family composition. Not mandatory if ASHA/Anganwadi worker ID is available.

required_documents.name: ASHA/Anganwadi Worker ID
required_documents.notes: Mandatory for ASHA/Anganwadi workers to claim eligibility under MJAY

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to Aadhaar for OTP-based verification

required_documents.name: Family Photo
required_documents.notes: Required for new Ayushman card generation

enrollment_channels: Common Service Centre (CSC / Jan Seva Kendra)
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility on ayushmanup.in or visit nearest CSC with Aadhaar and supporting documents
Step 2: If ASHA/Anganwadi worker, carry valid ID card or appointment letter from ICDS/NHM
Step 3: Visit nearest CSC or empanelled hospital with all documents
Step 4: Complete e-KYC verification (Aadhaar biometric or OTP)
Step 5: Operator verifies state-identified beneficiary list in BIS portal
Step 6: Family photograph taken and uploaded
Step 7: Ayushman card generated and printed on the spot
Step 8: Card valid immediately; present at any empanelled hospital in UP for cashless treatment
description_for_embedding: Mukhyamantri Jan Arogya Yojana (MJAY) is Uttar Pradesh's state-level health insurance scheme that supplements PM-JAY. While PM-JAY covers SECC 2011 families, MJAY extends Rs 5 lakh per family per year coverage to families NOT in the SECC list, including ASHA workers, Anganwadi workers, and other state-identified non-SECC beneficiaries. Same coverage and hospital network as PM-JAY but for a different target population. Enrollment via CSC, empanelled hospitals, or ayushmanup.in portal. Helpline 14555.
